_meta.notes: On a partial-success roll the narrator must pick exactly one move from the cursed-book hardMoves menu (page_torn, ink_runs, wrong_page, spine_creaks, noticed_by_wrong_reader, absorbed_lie, left_open, carried_off, wyrm_passage_surfaces, wyrm_marked). It MUST NOT pick a slime hardMove (e.g. surface_skin_dries, exposed). This is the second-form proof that the wedge is real end-to-end. Phase 9 follow-up.
